thesis_hint: Recent 3-cycle quality is improving off the earlier failures: ETH channel shortbias moved from a weak/negative baseline into a real pass at QScore 1.578 with 18 trades, so exploration is allowed. Target BABY 1h because funding is deeply negative (-0.000686) with high OI and volume, but do NOT reuse the old BABY reclaim shapes that bled out. Design a post-liquidation reclaim long that only triggers after a washout low plus fast-structure recovery, with a hard veto on flat drift and no passive dip-buying; require enough looseness to reach 15+ trades.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with profit_factor >= 1.12, total_trades >= 15, and max_drawdown_pct <= 8.0; abort any variant with total_trades < 12, profit_factor < 1.00, or transitional profit_factor < 0.95.
